mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase borrowing costs and discount rates for equity valuations, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean during rate hike periods with t-stat greater than 2.0.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 4.0 percent signals labor market deterioration and reduced consumer spending capacity, triggering negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 65 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 4.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in real GDP growth and acceleration in consumer price inflation creates stagflationary pressure that compresses corporate margins and equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC between the interaction term and 60-day returns falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production indicates robust supply-side capacity utilization and rising corporate revenues, generating positive short-term equity momentum when the economy operates above trend.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no statistical significance with p-value greater than 0.10 during periods of positive INDPRO growth.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels exceeding 300 reflect entrenched inflation that forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, depressing equity forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in greater than 70 percent of observations when CPIAUCSL surpasses 300.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with accelerating housing starts signal synchronized consumer and business demand expansion that drives positive equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to produce a positive mean return with t-stat greater than 1.5 over out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and wage growth that supports corporate earnings and generates positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns exhibit negative correlation with payroll growth across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 2017 baseline index level indicates severe supply-side contraction and weakening economic momentum, triggering negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in greater than 60 percent of cases when INDPRO falls below 100.
